official_models.name: 官方 GPT-5.2
official_models.description: 官方默认模型；统一口径：3 元人民币 / 100 万 Token。

agreements.title: User Terms of Service
agreements.content: Users must only submit lawful content and must review model output before external publication or commercial use.

agreements.title: Privacy Policy
agreements.content: Inputs, logs, billing events, and required payment data may be processed by the platform and upstream model providers as described in the privacy policy.

agreements.title: Recharge Service Agreement
agreements.content: Users must confirm that wallet recharges are used for official model usage and may not be refundable after consumption.
